quiz.question:
In this endgame, we are on the defending side as Black. 

White offers a rook trade.

Should we trade the rooks or not?

answers.text: We want to keep the rooks on the board. We can later chase some pawns and create higher drawing chances.

feedback.text: That's right, the passed d and c-pawns will also help us to create some counterplay.

distractors.text: We should accept the trade. The passed d and c-pawns are a good asset here and will provide enough counterplay.

feedback.text: The pawns on their own aren't as good. White can use the bishop to block some light squares to prevent our pawns from advancing.
